summary: Tested bug fixes for payment duplication, Cash Book auto-link to Pvt Paddy, Data Health Check, and Pay button loading state. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Login, Navigation, Payment dialog, Health Check all working.
critical_code_review_comments: PrivateTrading.jsx Pay buttons were missing disabled={payLoading} attribute - FIXED by testing agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Payment creates exactly 1 cash + 1 ledger entry (no duplicates), 2) Ledger entry includes round_off in amount, 3) Cash Book with party_type 'Pvt Paddy Purchase' auto-updates pvt_paddy paid_amount, 4) Data Health Check endpoint works (POST /api/cash-book/auto-fix returns success). Pay buttons in PaddyPurchase.jsx and PrivateTrading.jsx now have disabled={payLoading} and show 'Saving...' during submission.

bugs_tested.double_payment_prevention: PASS - payLoading state prevents double-click, button shows 'Saving...' and is disabled during API call
bugs_tested.cash_book_auto_link: PASS - Cash Book transaction with party_type 'Pvt Paddy Purchase' auto-updates pvt_paddy paid_amount
bugs_tested.data_health_check: PASS - POST /api/cash-book/auto-fix returns success, UI shows 'Sab theek hai - koi issue nahi!'
bugs_tested.payment_no_duplicates: PASS - Payment endpoint creates exactly 1 cash + 1 ledger entry
bugs_tested.ledger_includes_round_off: PASS - Ledger entry amount = payment amount + round_off
